entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Techniques used to gather information about an object or area from a distance, which are developing rapidly in interpretation and data handling.

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The field of farming and crop production where remote sensing is applied to improve productivity.

entities.name: MICROWAVE SIGNALS
entities.description: Specific signals used within remote sensing techniques for interpretation.

entities.name: DATA STORAGE AND PROCESSING
entities.description: The technical processes used to manage and analyze data collected via remote sensing.

entities.name: FOOD SUPPLIES
entities.description: The global availability of food, which remote sensing has the potential to increase.

relationships.description: Applied to improve agricultural practices and productivity
Utilizes the interpretation of microwave signals
Requires efficient storage and processing of collected data
Has the potential to be deployed to increase global food supplies
